tasks.label: clang-tidy
tasks.command: if ! command -v run-clang-tidy >/dev/null 2>&1; then echo "run-clang-tidy not found in PATH. Install clang-tidy and rerun."; exit 127; fi; files=$(git diff --name-only --diff-filter=d HEAD | grep '^src/.*\.cpp$' | grep -v '^build/'); if [ -z "$files" ]; then echo "No changed .cpp files to lint."; exit 0; fi; run-clang-tidy -p build -quiet -header-filter='^/workspaces/Achilles/src/' -extra-arg=-isystem/workspaces/Achilles/build -extra-arg=-isystem/workspaces/Achilles/build/_deps/eigen-src $(echo $files | tr '\n' ' ') 2>&1 | grep -vE '^[0-9]+ warnings generated\.$' || true
